source: pred.gg public profile + own aggregate baselines

archetype.label: The Grinder
archetype.receipt: 1,159 games of steady volume at 50.5% — the climb is about where the games go, not how many.

entries.change: Move your offlane games to jungle

entries.receipt: 52.0% over 166 games on Zinx vs 50.5% overall

entries.change: Queue jungle instead of your average mix
entries.receipt: 51.1% there vs 50.5% overall, 157 games of evidence

ledger.note: wins per 100 games spent on each change; entries overlap and do not sum

plan: Queue jungle as primary. It is your best role at 51.1% over 157 games (your overall is 50.5%). Set support as secondary, not the other way around.
Stop queueing offlane: 41.4% over 140 games is costing real VP. When auto-filled there, play your safest comfort pick, not a learning pick.
Your champion pool is 12+ heroes wide and your top three are only 47% of your games. Gold-to-Platinum climbs are almost always pool-narrowing stories: aim for 70%+ of games on your top three.
The math: you are at 600 VP; Platinum III starts at 900. Your all-time peak is 903 — you have already touched Platinum-level rating once; this is a consistency problem, not a ceiling problem.
honesty: personal winrates are shrunk toward your own average (small heater samples do not count as mains)
field baselines are all-ranks aggregates from our current-patch match sample, not Gold-bracket-specific yet
winrate edges are observational; they say where you win, not why

insights.title: Mr_Meat31 brings out your best
insights.finding: Your record alongside Mr_Meat31 is 54% over 304 ranked games — your strongest pairing in the stack. When only two of you queue, make it this one.

insights.title: Gadget is the long-term relationship
insights.finding: 222 games on Gadget at 50.5% — the field averages 50.0%. The comfort is real; the edge is roughly neutral.

insights.title: For the group chat
insights.finding: 1 pentakill in real 5v5s and a longest spree of 18 (plus 1 more in ARAM and brawls — the group chat can rule on whether those count). Willy has receipts.

insights.title: Your lean, relative to the squad: objective damage
insights.finding: Willy's profile sits mid-pack on most axes; the clearest lean is objective damage at 0.8x the squad average. Steady is a style too — the lineup can build around predictability.
